ljdkj jk"Vªh; jktekxZ ¼jk"Vªh; jktekxksZa ds [k.M@jk"Vªh; jktekxksZa ij LFkk;h iqy@vLFkk;h iqy ds mi;ksx ds fy, fdlh O;fDr }kjk 'kqYd dk laxzg.k½ fu;e] 1997 ds fu;e 3 ds lkFk ifBr] jk"Vªh; jktekxksZa vf/kfu;e] 1956 ¼1956 dk 48½ dh /kkjk 8d }kjk iznRr 'kfDr;ksa dk iz;ksx djrs gq,] ,rn~}kjk vf/klwpuk dk-vk-la- 1788 ¼v½] rkjh[k 01-07-2015 dks fujLr djrh gSA [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@508@09&10@lhvks@thlh ukfld¼oMkis&xksaMs½chvksVh] yhuk uUnu] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd March, 2016 S.O. 1201(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the use of section of National Highways/permanent bridge/temporary bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government by notification of the Government of India vide S.O. No. 912(E) dated 21.04.2010 authorized the Concessionaire to collect and retain fees from the mechanical vehicles for the section from km. 539.500 to km. 440.000 of NH-3 (Vadape – Gonde section). And whereas, an amendment to the original notification S.O. No. 912(E) dated 21.04.2010 was published vide S.O. No. 1788(E) dated 01.07.2015 authorizing the Concessionaire to collect and retain fees for the section from km. 539.500 to km. 440.000 of NH-3 (Vadape – Gonde section) at one location, km. 455.485 near Ghoti for the total Project stretch. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the use of section of National Highways/permanent bridge/temporary bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification S.O. No. 1788(E), dated 01.07.2015. [F. No. NHAI/13013/508/09-10/CO/GC Nashik (Vadape-Gonde) BOT] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy.
